id.description: The unique id of an action version.

action_id.description: The id of the action to which this version belongs.

code.description: The source code of this specific version of the action.

dependencies.description: The list of third party npm modules, and their versions, that this specific version depends on.

deployed.description: Indicates if this specific version is the currently one deployed.

secrets.description: The list of secrets that are included in an action or a version of an action.

number.description: The index of this version in list of versions for the action.

errors.description: Any errors that occurred while the version was being built.

built_at.description: The time when this version was built successfully.

created_at.description: The time when this version was created.

updated_at.description: The time when a version was updated. Versions are never updated externally. Only Auth0 will update an action version as it is being built.

supported_triggers.description: The list of triggers that this version supports. At this time, a version can only target a single trigger at a time.

modules.description: The list of action modules and their versions used by this action version.
